name: Flutter
desc: Fly over 3 tiles.

name: CrowFlutter2
desc: Fly over 3-4 tiles.

name: CrowFlutter3
desc: Fly over 2-5 tiles.

name: Aeroblast
desc: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.

name: CrowFlap2
desc: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

name: CrowFlap3
desc: A wind gust that deals 3 damage and 10 Knockback in a line.

name: Bloom
desc: Give 5 mana to allies in an area.

name: ManaBomb2
desc: Give 5 mana to allies in a large area.

name: SongofSpring
desc: Spawn flower tiles in an area.

name: SongOfSpring2
desc: Spawn flower tiles in a large area.

name: GrantLife
desc: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.

name: GrantLife2
desc: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

name: SquirrelSquad
desc: Summon 5 baby squirrels.

name: SquirrelSquad2
desc: Summon 5 adult squirrels.

name: SquirrelSwipes
desc: A melee attack that hits 1-3 times.

name: SummonSquirrel
desc: Summon a squirrel.

name: SummonSquirrel2
desc: Summon a squirrel to any tile.

name: SummonSnake
desc: Summon a snake.

name: SummonSnake2
desc:
Summon a slippery snake!
(It has a 66% dodge chance.)

name: SummonTurtle
desc: Summon a turtle.

name: SummonTurtle2
desc: Summon a turtle to any tile in range 6.

name: SummonToad
desc: Summon a toad.

name: SummonToad2
desc:
Summon a super toad!
(It has more damage, health, and can move an extra time each turn)

name: SummonBear
desc: Summon a bear.

name: SummonBear2
desc:
Summon a furious bear!
(It has Fury Swipes.)

name: StepIn
desc: Swap positions with a familiar.

name: DruidSwap2
desc: Swap positions with any unit.

name: BattleCry
desc: Give all familiars in an area +2 Damage.

name: BattleCry2
desc: Give all familiars +3 Damage.

name: StandByMe
desc: Teleport an ally to you.

name: PullToSafety2
desc: Teleport any unit to you.

name: BrambleBurst
desc: Explode a familiar causing damage to all adjacent units and spawning brambles.

name: BrambleBurst2
desc: Explode a familiar causing damage to all units in range 2 and spawning brambles.

name: FlowerFeet
desc: Move 3 tiles. Plant flowers as you move.

name: FlowerFeet2
desc: Move 5 tiles. Plant flowers as you move and where you end up.

name: ThornyFeet
desc: Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move.

name: ThornyFeet2
desc:
Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Encourage
desc: Give a familiar an extra turn after this one.

name: Encourage2
desc:
Give a familiar an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has increased range.)[/s]

name: Protection
desc: Give a familiar +1 [img:divineshield].

name: Protection
desc: Give familiars in a large area +1 [img:divineshield].

name: Promote
desc: The next familiar you spawn becomes a [img:champion] champion.

name: Promote
desc: The next familiar you spawn becomes an [img:elite] elite.

name: SafetyDance
desc: Give all allies +1 [img:shield].

name: SafetyDance2
desc: Give all allies +2 [img:shield].

name: WarCry
desc: Each familiar attacks their closest enemy immediately if they can.

name: WarCry2
desc: Your allies and familiars all attack their closest enemy immediately if they can.

name: FormoftheWolf
desc: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 [img:str], +2 [img:spd], -2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws and this becomes Pounce.

name: TigerForm2
desc: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 [img:str], +2 [img:spd], -2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws+ and this becomes Pounce+.

name: WolfClaws
desc: A 2-hit melee attack.

name: TigerSwipes2
desc: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts bleed.

name: Pounce
desc: Jump on a unit, damaging and displacing it.

name: Pounce2
desc: Jump on a unit, damaging, displacing and inflicting Bleed 1 to it.

name: FormoftheMonkey
desc: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 [img:dex], +2 [img:lck], -2 [img:con], and -2 [img:cha]. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss.

name: FormoftheMonkey
desc: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 [img:dex] and +2 [img:lck]. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss+.

name: ThrowPoop
desc: Throw poop.

name: MonkeyToss
desc: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something.

name: MonkeyThrow2
desc:
Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: FormoftheTurtle
desc: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 [img:con], +10 [img:shield], -2 [img:int], and -2 [img:spd]. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell.

name: FormoftheTurtle
desc: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 [img:con], +10 [img:shield], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell+.

name: HardenShell
desc: Gain +1 [img:shield], +1 Thorns, and +1 temporary Brace.

name: HardenSkin2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:shield], +1 Thorns, and +1 temporary Brace.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: HeadBash
desc: Dash forward one tile, then attack. This attack deals Knockback and has a chance to inflict Stun.

name: SummonCaterpillar
desc: Summon a caterpillar. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.

name: SummonCatepillar2
desc: Summon a caterpillar with All Stats Up 2. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.

name: SleepPowder
desc: Inflict Sleep on a unit.

name: CalltheWind
desc: Blow all units back one tile.

name: CallTheWind2
desc:
Blow all units back three tiles.
Allies are immune to knockback damage during this.

name: InspirationalSong
desc: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.

name: InspirationalSong2
desc: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

name: DeathMetal
desc: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear.

name: DeathMetal2
desc: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear. Inflict Madness on each other enemy.

name: ChaChaSlide
desc: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.

name: ChaChaSlide2
desc: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies gain +3 temporary Thorns and are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.

name: BestowWisdom
desc: Give +1 [img:int] to a unit.

name: BestowWisdom2
desc: Give +1 [img:int] and +2 mana to a unit.

name: FormoftheRaccoon
desc: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 [img:int], and -2 [img:str]. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge.

name: FormoftheRaccoon
desc: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 [img:int], and +2 [img:lck]. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge+.

name: Pilfer
desc: A melee attack that scatters two random pickups when it hits.

name: Scavenge
desc: Run to any pickup and collect it.

name: Scavenge2
desc: Run to any pickup and collect it. The effects of that pickup are doubled.

name: ResummonCrow
desc: Summon a new crow. Castable only if your crow is dead.

name: ResummonCrow
desc: Summon a crow.

name: WeWillRockYou
desc: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 [img:shield].

name: WeWillRockYou2
desc: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 [img:shield] and +2 Thorns.

name: FormoftheTree
desc: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 [img:int], +5 [img:shield], and Brace 2. You become immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize.

name: TreeForm2
desc: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 [img:int], +5 [img:shield], and Brace 4. You become immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize+.

name: Timber
desc: Fall into an adjacent tile, dealing massive damage to units you displace.

name: Synthesize
desc: Heal 2 HP and gain Charge 2.

name: Synthesize2
desc: You and allies within 3 tiles gain 2 HP and 2 Charge.

name: HydroPump
desc: Shoot a blast of water that deals 3 Knockback. This spell has recoil.

name: HydroPump2
desc: Shoot a long blast of water that deals 10 Knockback. This spell has recoil.

name: ControlPlants
desc: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage.

name: ControlPlants2
desc: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage and gain Poison 1.

name: ControlWater
desc: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP.

name: ControlWater2
desc: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP and have their debuffs cleansed.

name: ControlAir
desc: Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage.

name: ControlAir2
desc:
Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has infinite range.)[/s]

name: Self-destruct
desc: Explode.

name: FeralAttack
desc:
A melee attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Entangle
desc: Entangle units in an area.

name: Entangle2
desc: Entangle units in an area and spawn bramble tiles.

name: Lullaby
desc: Inflicts Sleep on units in an area.

name: Lullaby2
desc:
Inflicts Sleep on units in an area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has increased range.)[/s]

name: WeAretheChampions
desc:
Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: WeAreTheChampions2
desc:
Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Cheerlead
desc:
Make a target unit The Alpha.
PASSIVE: The first spell the Alpha casts each turn is cast twice.

name: Cheerlead2
desc:
Make a target unit The Alpha.
PASSIVE: The first spell the Alpha casts each turn is cast twice.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Nature'sBlessing
desc: Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration

name: NaturesBlessing2
desc:
Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has infinite range.)[/s]

name: ThrowEgg
desc: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its second turn.

name: ThrowEgg2
desc: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its first turn.

name: FormoftheSquirrel
desc:
Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form.
Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel.

name: SquirrelForm2
desc:
Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form.
Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel+.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: BirthSquirrel
desc:
Summon a squirrel.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Chitter
desc: Each squirrel gains +2 Damage and +2 [img:spd].

name: PlantMushroom
desc: Spawn a glowing mushroom that restores mana to nearby units on its turn.

name: PlantMushroom2
desc: Spawn a glowing mushroom anywhere that restores mana and health to nearby units on its turn.

name: Serenade
desc: Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in an area.

name: Serenade2
desc:
Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in a larger area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: WindyStep
desc: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move.

name: WindyStep2
desc: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move and +1 [img:spd]. They take their next turn earlier.

name: FormoftheElk
desc:
Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 [img:spd], -2 [img:int], -2 [img:con], and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving.
Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe and this becomes Prance.

name: FormoftheElk
desc:
Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 [img:spd] and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving.
Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe+ and this becomes Prance+.

name: AntlerSwipe
desc: Toss a unit up to four tiles away. Inflict Bruise on it and any unit it lands on.

name: AntlerSwipe2
desc: Toss a unit up to four tiles away. Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on it and any unit it lands on.

name: Prance
desc: Refresh your movement action.

name: Prance2
desc:
Refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: FormoftheMockingbird
desc:
Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining flying movement, +2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:str].
Your basic attack becomes Mock Song and this becomes Tease.

name: FormoftheMockingbird
desc:
Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining flying movement and +2 [img:lck].
Your basic attack becomes Mock Song+ and this becomes Tease+.

name: MockSong
desc: Give each unit within an area All Stats Down 2 until the end of their next turn.

name: MockSong
desc: Give enemies within an area All Stats Down 2 (and allies All Stats Up 2) until the the end of their next turn.

name: Tease
desc: Inflict Madness 1 on a unit.

name: Tease2
desc: Inflict Madness 1 on a unit. It immediately attacks a unit if it can.

name: FromtheTrees!
desc: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.

name: FromTheTrees2
desc:
Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
